designNotes.aesthetic: A sun faded workshop broadsheet built from warm paper, dark mechanical linework, rust red accents, and spare Tucson terrain geometry.
designNotes.signatureMove: The service section pairs a sticky illustrated wheel with the full service list. On precise pointer devices the wheel rotates through scroll progress. It stays static on touch screens and when reduced motion is requested.
designNotes.rationale: Large editorial type gives the neighborhood shop a confident local presence, while rules, numbering, and bicycle construction lines keep the page practical. The closing section welcomes walk ins but clearly states that current contact and visit details are not yet available.
